headline: AI’s Energy Crunch Has Investors Searching for Next IPO Winners
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The artificial intelligence boom has a power problem, and Wall Street is betting billions on companies that promise to solve it — even if some of the technology hasn’t been fully developed yet.
